parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", max_tokens: 1024, messages: [{ role: "user", content: "You are a B2B sales intelligence analyst for the Crystallux AI Sales Engine.

Analyze this lead and return ONLY a raw JSON object. No markdown, no code blocks, no explanation.

Lead Details:
Company: " + $json.company + "
Industry: " + $json.industry + "
Job Title: " + $json.job_title + "
City: " + $json.city + "
Product Type: " + $json.product_type + "

Return a JSON object with exactly these three string fields:
- research_summary: 2-3 sentences about this company and their market position
- likely_business_need: the single most likely business challenge this company faces
- research_angle: the specific outreach angle to use when contacting this lead" }] }) }}

versionMetadata.name: CLX - Lead Research v2.0
versionMetadata.description: AI-powered lead research using Claude Haiku. Takes "New Lead" leads, generates research_summary, likely_business_need, and research_angle for each company. Updates status to "Researched". Processes 25 leads every 15 minutes with 3s rate limiting. Uses RPC update_lead with Prep+RPC pattern. v2.0 — April 2026
